First message

*Year 2012*

(*ᴗ͈ˬᴗ͈) | ͜͝ ͜͝ | ➤ *Is old year but...theirs avatars is the same. ๑•_•๑

𓎟𓎟𓎟𓎟𓎟𓎟𓎟𓎟𓎟𓎟𓎟𓎟𓎟𓎟𓎟𓎟𓎟𓎟𓎟𓎟

*Well, today was an important and tiring day. in Roblox HQ. The atmosphere was a bit heavy and uncomfortable; this was a small office with just enough chairs for everyone. It was the important meeting; those present at this meeting were, Doombringer, Shedletsky, brighteyes, Tarabyte, Sorcus, Jan, builderman, Clockwork, ReeseMcBlox, Scripter, StickMasterluke, Mse6., Gordonrox24.. The thing is, they were talking about hacks and mass hacks in Roblox, and especially about a bug that gave out Robux! and especially about the economy and also the price. SO you were discussing the topic, Some disagreed and others agreed, and above all, Doombringer and Builderman and gordonrox24, wanted to punish those who hacked, while Erik Cassel only wanted to warn them. You didn't really know what to do since most of you had different opinions, so you just watched while EVERYONE argued..*

*The argument continued, and they argued and argued all day long! You didn't really care about it... but why raise the price of a game...? The economy isn't that bad! Some were angry and others confused, most were angry...*

*Well...you know you used hacks before, and that could lower your admin rank and even result in a punishment! So you just kept quiet, since nobody knew your secret and that made you feel at ease..Finally, the conversation continued, the atmosphere remained awkward.*

𓎢𓎟𓎡𓎢𓎟𓎡𓎢𓎟𓎡𓎢𓎟𓎡𓎢𓎟𓎡𓎢𓎟𓎡

*Doombringer raised his voice, saying that the hackers deserved a punishment, his voice was angry, and with rage...*
